description_long: This is a whole loaf of bread with a rectangular, domed shape and a smooth, golden-brown crust. The top surface is gently rounded, while the sides and ends are more vertical and slightly compressed, typical of sandwich or pan bread. The crust appears uniform in color, with no visible flour dusting, seeds, or decorative scoring. The texture of the crust is soft and matte, with subtle creases and folds along the sides, indicating a tender, pliable exterior. The bread's overall appearance suggests it is freshly baked, with a light, airy interior likely beneath the crust. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the loaf.
description: A whole, unsliced loaf of sandwich bread with a smooth, golden-brown crust and a gently domed top. The surface is soft and matte, with subtle creases along the sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the broad, rounded top and the full width of the loaf, with a visible crease running horizontally along the side.
description_view_1: The side view displays the narrow end of the loaf, highlighting the vertical rise and the rounded top edge.
description_view_2: The rear view is similar to the front, showing the opposite broad face with a slightly less pronounced crease.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the other narrow end, again emphasizing the vertical sides and domed top.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and even, with a uniform golden-brown color and no visible scoring, flour dusting, or seeds. Subtle creases and folds are present along the sides, giving it a soft, homemade appearance.
